name: Flowermate Cap Pro
summary: A compact conduction dry-herb vaporiser with full temperature control and an LED screen, for patients who want a discreet, simple everyday device.
description: The Flowermate Cap Pro is a small, pocketable dry-herb vaporiser with a stainless steel chamber and a 20-30 second heat-up. Despite the size it gives you full temperature control from 148 to 230C on an LED screen, with a five-minute session timer and 18-20 sessions per charge. USB-C charging tops it up in about an hour. The 0.3g oven suits lighter, single-person dosing. For a UK patient who wants a discreet, easy-to-load device with proper temperature control rather than fixed presets, the Cap Pro is a sensible, affordable pick.
